executionBudgetEvidence.commandMeasurement: unique Codex JSONL item identities whose type is command_execution
executionBudgetEvidence.tokenMeasurement: Codex turn.completed usage reported by the configured model provider
executionBudgetEvidence.inputAdmission: conservative gateway reservation; not an exact tokenizer count
executionBudgetEvidence.activeCommandOverrunAction: cancel the Codex child process on the first observed command beyond maxCommands
executionBudgetEvidence.platformEvidenceEnvelope: worksflow.platform.runner_execution is prepended after independent validation and before stdout evidence is content-addressed
